---
title: Spatiotemporal Exposures and Toxicology Group
subtitle: Style and Reproducible Research Guide
author: Kyle P Messier
date:  "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    df_print: kable
    toc_depth: 2
    always_allow_html: yes
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes=
    toc_depth: '2'    
---

## {SET}$_{group}$ logo


NIH>NIEHS>DTT>PTB>SET

The Spatiotemporal Exposures and Toxicology group also known as the SET group or SET. The acronym is also a nod to the mathematical set theory, so we can use the brackets {SET}. 

The following are all acceptable version of the SET name for publications and presentations:

1) Spatiotemporal Exposures and Toxicology Group 
2) {Spatiotemporal Exposures and Toxicology}
3) SET group 
4) {SET}$_{group}$  Note group is underscore 
5) {SET}
